name: @hlw-uni/mp-cli
description: uniapp 小程序脚手架生成器

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const path=require('path'),fs=require('fs');let c=fs.readFileSync('bin/cli.js','utf8');const fix='path2.join(__dirname,\"..\",\"templates\")';if(!c.includes(fix)){c=c.replace(/var TEMPLATES_DIR = path2\.join\(__dirname\);/,'var TEMPLATES_DIR = '+fix+';');fs.writeFileSync('bin/cli.js',c);console.log('Fixed TEMPLATES_DIR path')}"

author: hlw2326
